channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Legal Memo Questions Alaska's Decision to Remove Same-Name Senate Candidate From Ballot
item.description: A controversy has emerged in Alaska after the state's Division of Elections disqualified a Senate candidate named Dan Sullivan from appearing on the ballot against incumbent Republican U.S. Senator Da...

item.title: Colorado Attorney General Says Former DOJ Lawyers Are Leaving Federal Service and Joining State Government
item.description: Colorado Attorney General Phil Weiser, speaking on the Legal AF podcast, argued that the U.S. Department of Justice is experiencing a loss of experienced personnel as some lawyers choose to leave the ...

item.title: Obama Criticizes Trump’s Historical Narrative During Obama Presidential Center Opening in Chicago
item.description: Former President Barack Obama used the opening ceremony of the Obama Presidential Center in Chicago to deliver remarks that included indirect but pointed criticism of President Donald Trump and recent...

item.title: SE Cupp Calls Trump Supergluing Gold Decorations in Oval Office 'Unfathomable'
item.description: According to an upcoming book titled 'Regime Change' by New York Times reporters Maggie Haberman and Jonathan Swan, President Donald Trump was observed in the Oval Office clutching a tube of superglue...

item.title: Glamorous 1966 Portraits of Natalie Wood on the Set of ‘Penelope’
item.description: This article showcases a collection of glamorous behind-the-scenes and promotional portraits of Natalie Wood taken during the production of the 1966 comedy film ‘Penelope.’ At the time, Wood was 28 ye...

item.title: Rep. Tom Kean Jr. Announces Return to Congress After Months of Unexplained Absence
item.description: Republican Congressman Tom Kean Jr. of New Jersey is expected to return to Congress on June 30 after being absent from public view and House activities for approximately two months. According to his s...

item.title: Defense team for Luigi Mangione withdraws planned psychiatric defense shortly before trial
item.description: The legal team representing Luigi Mangione, a suspect in the killing of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson, has abruptly withdrawn a previously announced psychiatric defense strategy just one day aft...

item.title: Analyst Robert Kagan Argues Trump Will Misrepresent Any Iran War Settlement as a U.S. Victory

item.title: JD Vance Faces Criticism After Defending Trump's Communication Style as Reflective of Working-Class Speech
item.description: Vice President JD Vance drew criticism after defending President Donald Trump's communication style during an interview discussion about the administration's tone. The conversation arose when New York...

item.title: Legal Analyst Says Existing U.S. Law Could Complicate Implementation of Trump Administration's Iran Agreement
item.description: A legal debate has emerged over a memorandum of understanding reportedly signed between the Trump administration and Iran. According to comments made by former Florida state attorney Dave Aronberg on ...

item.title: Trump Administration Expands Denaturalization Efforts and Seeks to Increase Citizenship Revocation Cases
item.description: A CNN discussion highlighted the Trump administration's increased focus on denaturalization, a legal process through which naturalized U.S. citizens can have their citizenship revoked under specific c...

item.title: Arizona Appeals Court Blocks Maricopa County Recorder's Election Administration Order Ahead of Voting
item.description: An Arizona appellate court ruled against Maricopa County Recorder Justin Heap, a Republican election official aligned with former President Donald Trump, in a dispute over election administration auth...

item.title: Paint Peeling and Algae Problems Reported Following $14 Million Reflecting Pool Renovation
item.description: A news report highlighted ongoing issues at the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool in Washington, D.C., following a $14 million renovation project associated with the Trump administration. According to ...

item.title: Dr. Amir Khan Highlights Muscle Strength as a Key Factor Linked to Lower Dementia Risk
item.description: NHS doctor and television personality Dr. Amir Khan has shared evidence-based advice suggesting that maintaining muscle strength may play an important role in reducing the risk of dementia as people a...

item.title: Namibia Plans to Expand Marine Ecosystem Protection to 11% by 2030
item.description: Namibia has announced a stronger commitment to protecting its marine resources and biodiversity, with a goal of increasing the share of protected marine ecosystems from the current 1.7% to at least 11...

item.title: Report Says Trump Shared Document Comparing His Influence to Historical Rulers That Was Authored by a Golfer’s Caddy
item.description: According to a CNN report citing information from the forthcoming book 'Regime Change' by New York Times reporters Maggie Haberman and Jonathan Swan, President Donald Trump showed the authors a docume...

item.title: Reporter Discusses Possible Congressional Scrutiny of Stephen Miller Following Habeas Corpus Proposal Reports
item.description: A Raw Story article reports on comments made by veteran Washington journalist Scott MacFarlane regarding White House Deputy Chief of Staff Stephen Miller. According to the report, MacFarlane suggested...

item.title: Fox News Ends Live Coverage of Obama Presidential Center Speech and Shifts Focus to Iran Deal Discussion
item.description: Fox News interrupted its live coverage of former President Barack Obama's speech during the dedication ceremony for the Obama Presidential Center in Chicago on June 18, 2026. Obama was addressing atte...

item.title: Rep. Tom Kean Jr. Announces June 30 Return to Congress After Extended Health-Related Absence
item.description: Republican Representative Tom Kean Jr. of New Jersey has announced that he plans to return in person to the U.S. House of Representatives on June 30 after being absent from public view and congression...

item.title: Report Estimates Iran War Could Generate More Than $700 Billion in Additional Revenue for Global Fossil Fuel Companies
item.description: A report released by environmental organization 350.org argues that the economic consequences of the recent war between the United States and Iran will continue long after military operations end. Acc...
